subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou verily knowest my degradation and poverty, and Thou beholdest my burning anguish and desperation, and Thou hearest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک لتعلم ذلی و افتقاری و تری اضطرامی و اضطراری و تسمع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
